title: Faster physics in Python
summary: We’re open-sourcing a high-performance Python library for robotic simulation using the MuJoCo engine, developed over our past year of robotics research.
summaryZh: 我们正在开源一个高性能的Python库，用于使用MuJoCo引擎进行机器人模拟，该引擎是在我们过去一年的机器人研究过程中开发的。
highlights: We’re open-sourcing a high-performance Python library for robotic simulation using the MuJoCo engine, developed over our past year of robotics research.
highlightsZh: 我们正在开源一个高性能的Python库，用于使用MuJoCo引擎进行机器人模拟，该引擎是在我们过去一年的机器人研究过程中开发的。

title: Learning from human preferences
summary: One step towards building safe AI systems is to remove the need for humans to write goal functions, since using a simple proxy for a complex goal, or getting the complex goal a bit wrong, can lead to undesirable and even dangerous behavior. title: Learning to cooperate, compete, and communicate
summary: Multiagent environments where agents compete for resources are stepping stones on the path to AGI.
